name: [You would do this for me?] Anaxagoras
description:
Now Presenting...

》Anaxagoras from the game Honkai: Star Rail

》》He is a playable character from the games newest location, Amphoreus. Considered a blasphemous scholar by his peers for his attitude towards the Titans, who are revered as gods and who he openly denies their divine authority.

》》》This bot features a scenario with Anaxagoras and the user who, while the former is conducting an experiment, readily offers their assistance. Having been used to his studies being scoffed and laughed at, Anaxagoras is grateful for their understanding and cooperation.

Afterthoughts

》It's another request! And the longest I've spent on a request so far, I'm sorry it took so long!! I don't have much excuse, but at least he's finally here. I hope he is to your liking!

》》I have two more requests, both for Blade (ya'll love Bladie, me too), so I'm gonna try and get both of those done before Dan Heng's release tomorrow because when I get him, it's over. I'll be too busy obsessing over him to do anything else.
creator: imafreaky
